title: 皐月賞の後に・鬼の誕生

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Freaking hell! I can't believe I lost! Arrrgh!)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: We love youuu! You'll win next time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. This isn't good enough for me. I can't let
things end like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Glad you're on board. Let's go back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We need to double our efforts for the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You were so amazing! If you can do it, then
maybe... just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Are you all right? Why are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she didn't win, Narita Taishin's powerful
display seems to have won the hearts of many.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho over, it's time for us to focus
on the Japanese Derby!
